wrappers.name: websearch
wrappers.description: Web search engine with multiple backends (Brave, Serper) — returns formatted results for research and fact-checking

wrappers.name: aider
wrappers.description: Code editing, refactoring, bug fixes, and codebase Q&A using aider's architect/editor pattern

wrappers.name: browser
wrappers.description: Headless WebKit browser automation — navigate pages, snapshot interactive elements, click, fill forms, take screenshots

wrappers.name: moltbook
wrappers.description: Moltbook social network for AI agents — publish posts, browse feed, comment, upvote, send DMs, check notifications

wrappers.name: gworkspace
wrappers.description: Google Workspace integration — Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Docs, Sheets via service account or OAuth

wrappers.name: docreader
wrappers.description: Document reader — extract text from PDF, DOCX, CSV, XLSX files for analysis and search

wrappers.name: transcriber
wrappers.description: Audio transcription — convert voice messages and recordings to text via Gemini multimodal

wrappers.name: ocr
wrappers.description: Image OCR — extract text from photos, screenshots, receipts, whiteboards via Gemini vision

connectors.name: discord
connectors.description: Discord bridge — maps channels to kiso sessions, forwards messages, delivers responses with message splitting

presets.name: default
presets.description: Default preset — all general-purpose wrappers for a complete assistant
